MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: WILLIS-MCGHEE; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, TENDERLOIN HOUSING is present. Represented by SHELLEY ST. GEORGE
Attorney, PAUL HOGARTH, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, PRISCILLA O'DONNELL, is present.
Attorney, ELAINE K. LEE, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem MIKE LEE, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503B, for settlement discussions. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-18-2010 is vacated.
